name: Mutual Exclusion
generated_spec:
---- MODULE MutualExclusion ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets
CONSTANTS N

VARIABLES state, flag, turn

Init == /\ state = [p \in 1..N |-> "idle"]
        /\ flag = [p \in 1..N |-> FALSE]
        /\ turn = 1

Next == \E p \in 1..N :
          /\ state' = [state EXCEPT ![p] = "trying"]
          /\ flag' = [flag EXCEPT ![p] = TRUE]
          /\ turn' = p
          /\ \A q \in 1..N : q # p => state[q] # "critical"
          /\ \A q \in 1..N : q # p => flag[q] = FALSE
          /\ state' = [state EXCEPT ![p] = "critical"]
          /\ state' = [state EXCEPT ![p] = "idle"]
          /\ UNCHANGED <<flag, turn>>

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<state, flag, turn>>

TypeOK == /\ state \in [1..N -> {"idle", "trying", "critical"}]
          /\ flag \in [1..N -> BOOLEAN]
          /\ turn \in 1..N

name: Two-Phase Commit
generated_spec:
---- MODULE TwoPhaseCommit ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets, TLC

CONSTANT N, Participants, Coordinator
VARIABLES coordinator, participants, state


vars == <<participants, coordinator>>

Init == /\ participants = [p \in Participants |-> [state |-> "Init"]]
        /\ coordinator = [state |-> "Init"]

Prepare == /\ coordinator.state = "Init"
           /\ coordinator.state' = "Prepare"
           /\ \A p \in Participants: participants[p].state' = "Prepare"

VoteYes == /\ coordinator.state = "Prepare"
           /\ coordinator.state' = "VoteYes"
           /\ \A p \in Participants: participants[p].state' = "VoteYes"

VoteNo == /\ coordinator.state = "Prepare"
          /\ coordinator.state' = "VoteNo"
          /\ \A p \in Participants: participants[p].state' = "VoteNo"

Commit == /\ coordinator.state = "VoteYes"
          /\ coordinator.state' = "Commit"
          /\ \A p \in Participants: participants[p].state' = "Commit"

Abort == /\ coordinator.state = "VoteNo"
         /\ coordinator.state' = "Abort"
         /\ \A p \in Participants: participants[p].state' = "Abort"

Next == Prepare \/ VoteYes \/ VoteNo \/ Commit \/ Abort

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_vars

TypeOK == /\ coordinator \in [state : {"Init", "Prepare", "VoteYes", "VoteNo", "Commit", "Abort"}]
          /\ \A p \in Participants: participants[p] \in [state : {"Init", "Prepare", "VoteYes", "VoteNo", "Commit", "Abort"}]
          /\ coordinator.state \in {"Init", "Prepare", "VoteYes", "VoteNo", "Commit", "Abort"}
          /\ \A p \in Participants: participants[p].state \in {"Init", "Prepare", "VoteYes", "VoteNo", "Commit", "Abort"}

name: Dining Philosophers
generated_spec:
---- MODULE DiningPhilosophers ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

CONSTANT N
VARIABLES ForkOwner, State


\* Philosopher states
States == {"thinking", "hungry", "eating"}

\* Each philosopher is identified by an integer 0..N-1
Philosophers == 0 .. N-1

\* Each fork is identified by an integer 0..N-1
Forks == 0 .. N-1

\* The left fork of philosopher i is i
LeftFork(i) == i

\* The right fork of philosopher i is (i + 1) mod N
RightFork(i) == (i + 1) \mod N

\* State of each philosopher
State == [p \in Philosophers |-> States]

\* Ownership of each fork: either a philosopher or NONE
ForkOwner == [f \in Forks |-> [p \in Philosophers \cup {NONE} |-> BOOLEAN]]

\* Initial state: all philosophers are thinking, no forks are owned
Init == /\ State = [p \in Philosophers |-> "thinking"]
        /\ ForkOwner = [f \in Forks |-> [p \in Philosophers \cup {NONE} |-> FALSE]]
        /\ \A f \in Forks : ForkOwner[f][NONE] = TRUE

\* A philosopher can pick up a fork if it is free
CanPickUp(f, p) == ForkOwner[f][p] = FALSE

\* Action: philosopher p picks up fork f
PickUp(f, p) == ForkOwner' = [ForkOwner EXCEPT ![f][p] = TRUE]

\* Action: philosopher p puts down fork f
PutDown(f, p) == ForkOwner' = [ForkOwner EXCEPT ![f][p] = FALSE]

\* Action: philosopher p starts eating (picks up both forks)
StartEating(p) == /\ State' = [State EXCEPT ![p] = "eating"]
                 /\ PickUp(LeftFork(p), p)
                 /\ PickUp(RightFork(p), p)

\* Action: philosopher p stops eating (puts down both forks)
StopEating(p) == /\ State' = [State EXCEPT ![p] = "thinking"]
                 /\ PutDown(LeftFork(p), p)
                 /\ PutDown(RightFork(p), p)

\* Action: philosopher p becomes hungry
BecomeHungry(p) == /\ State' = [State EXCEPT ![p] = "hungry"]
                 /\ State = State'

\* Next-state relation: any philosopher can become hungry, start eating, or stop eating
Next == \E p \in Philosophers :
          \/ (State[p] = "thinking" /\ CanPickUp(LeftFork(p), p) /\ CanPickUp(RightFork(p), p) /\ StartEating(p))
          \/ (State[p] = "hungry" /\ CanPickUp(LeftFork(p), p) /\ CanPickUp(RightFork(p), p) /\ StartEating(p))
          \/ (State[p] = "eating" /\ StopEating(p))
          \/ (State[p] = "thinking" /\ BecomeHungry(p))

\* Invariant: no two adjacent philosophers are eating simultaneously
NoAdjacentEating == \A p \in Philosophers :

                        State[LeftFork(p)] # "eating" /\ State[RightFork(p)] # "eating"

                        TRUE

\* Invariant: each fork is owned by at most one philosopher
ForkOwnership == \A f \in Forks :
                   Cardinality({p \in Philosophers : ForkOwner[f][p]}) <= 1

\* Invariant: each fork is owned by exactly one philosopher or none
ForkOwnershipComplete == \A f \in Forks :
                           \E p \in Philosophers \cup {NONE} : ForkOwner[f][p]

\* Invariant: each philosopher owns at most two forks
PhilosopherForkCount == \A p \in Philosophers :
                         Cardinality({f \in Forks : ForkOwner[f][p]}) <= 2

\* Invariant: each philosopher owns exactly two forks when eating
PhilosopherForkCountEating == \A p \in Philosophers :

                                 Cardinality({f \in Forks : ForkOwner[f][p]}) = 2

                                 TRUE

\* Invariant: each philosopher owns at most one fork when hungry
PhilosopherForkCountHungry == \A p \in Philosophers :

                                 Cardinality({f \in Forks : ForkOwner[f][p]}) <= 1

                                 TRUE

\* Invariant: each philosopher owns no forks when thinking
PhilosopherForkCountThinking == \A p \in Philosophers :

                                   Cardinality({f \in Forks : ForkOwner[f][p]}) = 0

                                   TRUE

\* Invariant: each fork is owned by at most one philosopher
TypeOK == ForkOwnership /\ ForkOwnershipComplete /\ PhilosopherForkCount /\ PhilosopherForkCountEating /\ PhilosopherForkCountHungry /\ PhilosopherForkCountThinking

\* Specification: the system starts in Init and follows Next forever
Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<State, ForkOwner>>

name: Lamport's Bakery Algorithm
generated_spec:
---- MODULE Bakery ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

Max(S) == CHOOSE x \in S : \A y \in S : x >= y

CONSTANT N
VARIABLES flag, num

vars == <<num, flag>>

Init == /\ num = [i \in 1..N |-> 0]
        /\ flag = [i \in 1..N |-> FALSE]

Next == \E i \in 1..N :
          \/ /\ flag[i] = FALSE
             /\ flag' = [flag EXCEPT ![i] = TRUE]
             /\ num' = [num EXCEPT ![i] = Max(num) + 1]
             /\ flag' = [flag EXCEPT ![i] = FALSE]
          \/ /\ flag[i] = TRUE
             /\ num' = num
             /\ flag' = flag

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_vars

TypeOK == /\ num \in [1..N -> Nat]
          /\ flag \in [1..N -> BOOLEAN]

name: Producer-Consumer Queue
generated_spec:
---- MODULE BoundedFIFOQueue ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

CONSTANT K

VARIABLES q, head, tail, size

vars == <<q, head, tail, size>>

Init == /\ q = [i \in 1..K |-> 0]
        /\ head = 1
        /\ tail = 1
        /\ size = 0

ProducerAction == /\ size < K
                 /\ q[tail] = 0
                 /\ q' = [q EXCEPT ![tail] = 1]
                 /\ tail' = IF tail = K THEN 1 ELSE tail + 1
                 /\ size' = size + 1
                 /\ UNCHANGED <<head>>

ConsumerAction == /\ size > 0
                 /\ q[head] = 1
                 /\ q' = [q EXCEPT ![head] = 0]
                 /\ head' = IF head = K THEN 1 ELSE head + 1
                 /\ size' = size - 1
                 /\ UNCHANGED <<tail>>

Next == ProducerAction \/ ConsumerAction

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_vars

TypeOK == /\ head \in 1..K
          /\ tail \in 1..K
          /\ size \in 0..K
          /\ \A i \in 1..K: q[i] \in {0,1}
          /\ size = Cardinality({i \in 1..K: q[i] = 1})

name: Raft Leader Election
generated_spec:
---- MODULE RaftElection ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

CONSTANTS N, majority, NULL

VARIABLES currentTerm, votedFor, state, hasn

(* State can be "Follower", "Candidate", or "Leader" *)

Init == 
    /\ currentTerm = 0
    /\ votedFor = [s \in 1..N |-> NULL]
    /\ state = [s \in 1..N |-> "Follower"]

(* A server can become a candidate if it hasn't voted for anyone in its current term *)
BecomeCandidate(s) == 
    /\ state[s] = "Follower"
    /\ currentTerm' = currentTerm + 1
    /\ votedFor' = [votedFor EXCEPT ![s] = s]
    /\ state' = [state EXCEPT ![s] = "Candidate"]

(* A server can become a leader if it receives votes from a majority *)
BecomeLeader(s) == 
    /\ state[s] = "Candidate"
    /\ \E t \in 1..currentTerm : 
        \E votes \in 1..N \ {s} : 
            Cardinality({v \in votes : votedFor[v] = s}) >= majority
    /\ state' = [state EXCEPT ![s] = "Leader"]

(* A server can become a follower if it receives a message with a higher term *)
BecomeFollower(s, t) == 
    /\ state[s] = "Candidate" \/ state[s] = "Leader"
    /\ t > currentTerm
    /\ currentTerm' = t
    /\ votedFor' = [votedFor EXCEPT ![s] = NULL]
    /\ state' = [state EXCEPT ![s] = "Follower"]

Next == 
    \E s \in 1..N : 
        \/ BecomeCandidate(s)
        \/ \E t \in 1..currentTerm : BecomeFollower(s, t)
        \/ BecomeLeader(s)

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<currentTerm, votedFor, state>>

TypeOK == 
    /\ currentTerm \in Nat
    /\ votedFor \in [1..N -> {NULL} \cup 1..N]
    /\ state \in [1..N -> {"Follower", "Candidate", "Leader"}]

name: Read-Write Lock
generated_spec:
---- MODULE ReadWriteLock ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

VARIABLES readers, writer_active

Init == 
  /\ readers = <<>> 
  /\ writer_active = FALSE

Next == 
  /\ \E r \in 1..Len(readers) :
        /\ readers[r] = TRUE
        /\ readers' = Replace(readers, r, FALSE)
        /\ writer_active' = writer_active
  \/ \E r \in 1..Len(readers) :
        /\ readers[r] = FALSE
        /\ readers' = Replace(readers, r, TRUE)
        /\ writer_active' = writer_active
  \/ /\ writer_active = FALSE
     /\ writer_active' = TRUE
     /\ readers' = readers

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<readers, writer_active>>

name: Distributed Snapshot (Chandy-Lamport)
generated_spec:
---- MODULE DistributedSnapshot ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets, TLC

CONSTANT N, PowerSet
CONSTANT Channels

VARIABLES state, channel, recorded, snapshot, markerSent

(* Local state of each process *)
state == [i \in 1..N |-> state[i] \in {"UNRECORDED", "RECORDING", "RECORD_DONE"}]

(* Channel buffers: channel[i][j] is the set of messages in channel (i,j) *)
channel == [i \in 1..N, j \in 1..N |-> channel[i][j] \in PowerSet[Message]]

(* Whether process i has recorded its state *)
recorded == [i \in 1..N |-> recorded[i] \in BOOLEAN]

(* Snapshot data: snapshot[i] is the recorded state of process i *)
snapshot == [i \in 1..N |-> snapshot[i] \in {"UNRECORDED", "RECORDING", "RECORD_DONE"}]

(* Whether process i has sent marker on outgoing channels *)
markerSent == [i \in 1..N |-> markerSent[i] \in BOOLEAN]

(* Message type *)
Message == {"DATA", "MARKER"}

(* Initial state: all processes unrecorded, channels empty *)
Init == /\ state = [i \in 1..N |-> "UNRECORDED"]
        /\ channel = [i \in 1..N, j \in 1..N |-> {}]
        /\ recorded = [i \in 1..N |-> FALSE]
        /\ snapshot = [i \in 1..N |-> "UNRECORDED"]
        /\ markerSent = [i \in 1..N |-> FALSE]

(* Process i records its state and sends marker on outgoing channels *)
RecordState(i) == /\ state[i] = "UNRECORDED"
                 /\ state' = [state EXCEPT ![i] = "RECORDING"]
                 /\ recorded' = [recorded EXCEPT ![i] = TRUE]
                 /\ snapshot' = [snapshot EXCEPT ![i] = "RECORDING"]
                 /\ markerSent' = [markerSent EXCEPT ![i] = TRUE]
                 /\ channel' = [channel EXCEPT ![i][j] = channel[i][j] \cup {"MARKER"} : j \in 1..N \ {i}]
                 /\ UNCHANGED <<state, recorded, snapshot, markerSent>>

(* Process i receives a data message from process j *)
ReceiveData(i, j) == /\ state[i] = "RECORDING"
                    /\ channel[j][i] /= {}
                    /\ channel' = [channel EXCEPT ![j][i] = channel[j][i] \ {Head(channel[j][i])}]
                    /\ UNCHANGED <<state, recorded, snapshot, markerSent>>

(* Process i receives a marker from process j *)
ReceiveMarker(i, j) == /\ state[i] = "UNRECORDED"
                      /\ channel[j][i] /= {}
                      /\ state' = [state EXCEPT ![i] = "RECORDING"]
                      /\ recorded' = [recorded EXCEPT ![i] = TRUE]
                      /\ snapshot' = [snapshot EXCEPT ![i] = "RECORDING"]
                      /\ markerSent' = [markerSent EXCEPT ![i] = TRUE]
                      /\ channel' = [channel EXCEPT ![j][i] = channel[j][i] \ {Head(channel[j][i])}]
                      /\ UNCHANGED <<state, recorded, snapshot, markerSent>>

(* Process i finishes recording after receiving markers on all incoming channels *)
FinishRecording(i) == /\ state[i] = "RECORDING"
                     /\ \A j \in 1..N \ {i} : channel[j][i] = {}
                     /\ state' = [state EXCEPT ![i] = "RECORD_DONE"]
                     /\ snapshot' = [snapshot EXCEPT ![i] = "RECORD_DONE"]
                     /\ UNCHANGED <<recorded, markerSent, channel>>

(* Next-state relation *)
Next == \E i \in 1..N : RecordState(i)
      \/ \E i, j \in 1..N : ReceiveData(i, j)
      \/ \E i, j \in 1..N : ReceiveMarker(i, j)
      \/ \E i \in 1..N : FinishRecording(i)

(* Specification *)
Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<state, recorded, snapshot, markerSent, channel>>

(* Invariant: all processes eventually finish recording *)
TypeOK == \A i \in 1..N : state[i] \in {"UNRECORDED", "RECORDING", "RECORD_DONE"}

name: Token Ring
generated_spec:
---- MODULE TokenRing ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

CONSTANT N

VARIABLES token, nodes

Init == /\ token \in 1..N
        /\ nodes = [i \in 1..N |-> [sent \in BOOLEAN, received \in BOOLEAN]]

Next == /\ token' = IF token = N THEN 1 ELSE token + 1
        /\ UNCHANGED nodes

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<token, nodes>>

TypeOK == /\ token \in 1..N
          /\ nodes \in [1..N -> [sent \in BOOLEAN, received \in BOOLEAN]]

name: Simple Key-Value Store
generated_spec:
---- MODULE KeyValueStore ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets, TLC

CONSTANTS Keys, Values, NULL
VARIABLES store


vars == << store >>

Init == 
  /\ store = [k \in Keys |-> NULL]

Next == 
  /\ \E k \in Keys : \E v \in Values :
        /\ store' = [store EXCEPT ![k] = v]
        /\ UNCHANGED << >>

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_vars

TypeOK == 
  /\ store \in [Keys -> Values]
  /\ TRUE

name: Paxos Single-Decree
generated_spec:
---- MODULE Paxos ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

CONSTANTS N, M, V, Ballot, Value

VARIABLES acceptors, proposers, chosen

vars == <<acceptors, proposers, chosen>>

Init == 
  /\ acceptors = [i \in 1..N |-> [maxBallot -> 0, promisedBallot -> 0, chosenBallot -> 0, chosenValue -> NULL]]
  /\ proposers = [i \in 1..M |-> [maxBallot -> 0, promisedBallot -> 0, chosenBallot -> 0, chosenValue -> NULL]]
  /\ chosen = <<>> 

Prepare(p, b) == 
  /\ acceptors' = [i \in 1..N |-> acceptors[i] \cup [maxBallot -> b]]
  /\ proposers' = proposers
  /\ chosen' = chosen

Promise(p, b) == 
  /\ acceptors' = acceptors
  /\ proposers' = [i \in 1..M |-> IF proposers[i].maxBallot = b THEN proposers[i] \cup [promisedBallot -> b] ELSE proposers[i]]
  /\ chosen' = chosen

Accept(p, b, v) == 
  /\ acceptors' = [i \in 1..N |-> acceptors[i] \cup [maxBallot -> b, chosenBallot -> b, chosenValue -> v]]
  /\ proposers' = proposers
  /\ chosen' = chosen

Accepted(p, b, v) == 
  /\ acceptors' = acceptors
  /\ proposers' = proposers
  /\ chosen' = <<v>>

Choose(p, b, v) == 
  /\ acceptors' = acceptors
  /\ proposers' = proposers
  /\ chosen' = Append(chosen, v)

Next == 
  /\ \E p \in 1..M : \E b \in 1..N : 
        /\ proposers[p].maxBallot = b
        /\ Prepare(p, b)
        /\ Promise(p, b)
  \/ \E p \in 1..M : \E b \in 1..N : \E v \in V : 
        /\ proposers[p].maxBallot = b
        /\ Accept(p, b, v)
        /\ Accepted(p, b, v)
  \/ \E p \in 1..M : \E b \in 1..N : \E v \in V : 
        /\ proposers[p].maxBallot = b
        /\ Choose(p, b, v)

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_vars

TypeOK == 
  /\ acceptors \in [1..N -> [maxBallot: Nat, promisedBallot: Nat, chosenBallot: Nat, chosenValue: V \cup {NULL}]]
  /\ proposers \in [1..M -> [maxBallot: Nat, promisedBallot: Nat, chosenBallot: Nat, chosenValue: V \cup {NULL}]]
  /\ chosen \in Seq(V)

====

name: Bounded Retransmission Protocol
generated_spec:
---- MODULE Sender ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, TLC

CONSTANTS MAX_RETRIES, CHUNK_SIZE, FILE_SIZE, TIMEOUT
VARIABLES ackReceived, chunkIndex, retransmitCount, state, timer

    /\ state = "idle"
    /\ file = Seq(1..FILE_SIZE) \* file represented as a sequence of bytes
    /\ chunks = [i \in 1..Ceiling(FILE_SIZE \div CHUNK_SIZE) |-> 

            SubSeq(file, (i-1)*CHUNK_SIZE + 1, i*CHUNK_SIZE)

            SubSeq(file, (i-1)*CHUNK_SIZE + 1, FILE_SIZE)]
    /\ chunkIndex = 1
    /\ retransmitCount = 0
    /\ timer = 0
    /\ ackReceived = FALSE

SendChunk == 
    /\ state = "idle"
    /\ state' = "sending"
    /\ ackReceived' = FALSE
    /\ retransmitCount' = 0
    /\ UNCHANGED <<file, chunks, chunkIndex, timer>>

ReceiveAck == 
    /\ state = "sending"
    /\ ackReceived' = TRUE
    /\ state' = "idle"
    /\ chunkIndex' = chunkIndex + 1
    /\ retransmitCount' = 0
    /\ timer' = 0
    /\ UNCHANGED <<file, chunks>>

Retransmit == 
    /\ state = "sending"
    /\ ackReceived' = FALSE
    /\ retransmitCount' = retransmitCount + 1
    /\ timer' = 0
    /\ UNCHANGED <<file, chunks, chunkIndex>>

Timeout == 
    /\ state = "sending"
    /\ timer' = timer + 1
    /\ IF timer + 1 > TIMEOUT THEN

            state' = "failed"

            state' = "sending"
            retransmitCount' = retransmitCount + 1
            timer' = 0

        UNCHANGED <<state, retransmitCount>>

    /\ UNCHANGED <<file, chunks, chunkIndex, ackReceived>>

Next == 
    \E action \in {SendChunk, ReceiveAck, Retransmit, Timeout} : action

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<state, file, chunks, chunkIndex, retransmitCount, timer, ackReceived>>

TypeOK == 
    /\ state \in {"idle", "sending", "failed"}
    /\ file \in Seq(1..FILE_SIZE)
    /\ chunks \in [1..Ceiling(FILE_SIZE \div CHUNK_SIZE) -> Seq(1..CHUNK_SIZE)]
    /\ chunkIndex \in 1..Ceiling(FILE_SIZE \div CHUNK_SIZE) + 1
    /\ retransmitCount \in 0..MAX_RETRIES
    /\ timer \in 0..TIMEOUT
    /\ ackReceived \in BOOLEAN

====
